summary: Verified v2.6.21 hybrid-UA 'mixed browser leak' fix on Krexion backend. Backend up, /api/system/version returns 2.6.21, admin login on preview URL works with admin@krexion.local / Krexion@Preview2026! -> access_token returned. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_v2_6_21_hybrid_ua_leak_fix.py with 11 tests covering all 9 scenarios from the review request (BUG A, BUG B, IG-stripping, WebView-Cronet regression, idempotent Cronet, FB-keeps-Chrome/Safari, IG target strips TT markers, generator Cronet shape x25, iOS generator no Safari x15, and generator->coerce composition idempotency). All 11 new tests PASS. Also re-ran existing v2.6.18 (6) + v2.6.19 (6) suites: all 12 remain green. Bug fix VERIFIED.

minor.issue: Pre-existing failing suite (13 errors) — has stale hardcoded ADMIN_PASSWORD='Krexion@2026' but current preview password is 'Krexion@Preview2026!'. All errors are fixture setup failures on admin_token due to wrong password. Unrelated to v2.6.21 UA fix. Fix: update ADMIN_PASSWORD constant to 'Krexion@Preview2026!' (or read from env).

Pre-existing failing test — asserts '_ctx_headers' string appears in a hard-coded source line window (lines 8778:8830 of real_user_traffic.py). The window has drifted due to unrelated additions. Unrelated to v2.6.21 UA fix.
Same stale-password issue as test_rut_referrer_bugs.py. Unrelated to v2.6.21 UA fix.

action_items: None for v2.6.21 fix itself — all 11 new + 12 existing (v2.6.18/v2.6.19) tests PASS. Fix codified and regression-guarded.

OPTIONAL (unrelated cleanup): update ADMIN_PASSWORD in /app/backend/tests/test_rut_referrer_bugs.py and /app/backend/tests/test_rut_referrer_concurrency_fixes_2026_02.py from 'Krexion@2026' to 'Krexion@Preview2026!' (or read from env/test_credentials.md) so those pre-existing suites become runnable again.

OPTIONAL: fix stale line-range assertion in tests/test_rut_referrer_concurrency_fixes_2026_02.py::TestCtxArgsFix — change from src_lines[8778:8830] to a text-search for '_ctx_headers' anywhere in rut source (line indices drift).
critical_code_review_comments: coerce_ua_for_platform() flow reorder is correct: strip foreign -> Cronet-leak guard (TikTok Android only) -> idempotency check on CLEANED ua -> append if needed. Existing musical_ly suffix is preserved via a regex capture (r'\s+musical_ly[_A-Za-z0-9]*\s+.*?BytedanceWebview/\S+') before rebuild — verified working on hybrid inputs.

server._ua_tiktok_android() now emits Cronet-shape UA matching referrer_pro._rebuild_tiktok_android_ua_base output so downstream coerce is a no-op. Verified by test_generator_output_is_idempotent_through_coerce (musical_ly_ appears exactly once, no Chrome/, no Mobile Safari).
server.py is 25685 lines — long overdue for modular split (device pools, UA generators, region picker, etc. each merit their own module). Not a v2.6.21 blocker.
test_credentials: admin@krexion.local / Krexion@Preview2026! (verified working on preview URL)
seed_data_creation: None — pure unit tests on referrer_pro.coerce_ua_for_platform() and server._ua_tiktok_android/_ua_tiktok_ios generators. No DB writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug FIX VERIFIED for v2.6.21 hybrid-UA leak. The two pre-existing failing suites (test_rut_referrer_bugs.py and test_rut_referrer_concurrency_fixes_2026_02.py) have stale admin password 'Krexion@2026' and a stale source-line-range assertion — both unrelated to the UA fix. Skip or update those before running regression again.
rca of the issue: Root cause: referrer_pro.coerce_ua_for_platform() was short-circuiting on idempotency (_ua_has_inapp_marker) BEFORE stripping foreign in-app markers. Hybrid UAs (musical_ly + FBAV, or musical_ly + Chrome/MobileSafari WebView leaks) passed through UNCHANGED because they contained the target marker. Downstream advertiser UA parsers read left-to-right and latched on the earlier foreign bracket (FB) or Chrome/Safari tokens, mis-labelling clicks as Facebook / Chrome / Safari instead of TikTok. Fix reorders the flow: strip foreign markers -> (TikTok Android only) Cronet-leak guard rebuilds base if Chrome/Safari still present, preserving any clean musical_ly suffix -> THEN idempotency check on the cleaned UA -> append target suffix if still needed. Additionally, server._ua_tiktok_android() itself was emitting the old WebView shape (Chrome + Mobile Safari) so the generator's own output was triggering the coerce rebuild every run; rewritten to true Cronet shape so generator->coerce is a no-op.
